item.description: I am a Research Scientist at NYU Grossman School of Medicine, where I do research to assess and improve the quality of our education program. I apply different statistical tools like machine learning to our data and most recently, I started exploring tools like Stan and PyMC3 and their potential applications to our research. I am very interested in Bayesian Inference, Probabilistic Computing and Machine Learning, and in this blog I present my learning path through a series of data stories using open data from whatever topic catches my interest. Every now and then I may also post musical recommendations that I like playing while coding these stories.
